content: The original Self-Refine framework's single-perspective iterative feedback loop can be augmented with the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective Self-Refine system that outperforms both existing approaches. This hybrid system retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data while resolving its major limitation of getting stuck in local optimization loops caused by uniform self-feedback from a single model perspective.
